title: Forge Seed Manifest
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 contract for a Forge seed package (F-821). A seed is a versioned bundle of ordered idempotent data files applied via UPSERT.

name.description: Slug identifying the seed package (matches the directory name).

version.description: Manifest version. Monotonic integer; increment on any data-file change.

tenant_type.description: Tenant classification. Demo seeds are blocked in env=production without --allow-in-prod.

depends_on.description: Ordered list of seed names that must be applied first. Checked against seed_migrations.

data_files.description: Ordered list of JSON data files applied via UPSERT.

file.description: Filename relative to the seed's data/ directory.

table.description: Postgres table name the file's rows are upserted into.

order.description: 1-based application order; data files apply in ascending order.

idempotency_key.description: Column names forming the natural key used by ON CONFLICT.

depends_on_files.description: Filenames that must apply before this one (must precede in order).

row_counts_expected.description: Expected row counts per table after apply; used as a smoke test.

post_insert_hooks.description: Optional named hooks that run after every data file applies successfully.

allow_in_prod.description: Default false. When true, the seed may apply in env=production without --allow-in-prod.
